mapper.sql: appointment_id, patient_id, patient_name, patient_phone, doctor_id, doctor_name, schedule_id, appointment_date, appointment_time, sequence_number, status, is_offline, called, called_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_appointment( patient_id, patient_name, patient_phone, doctor_id, doctor_name, schedule_id, appointment_date, appointment_time, sequence_number, status, is_offline, remark, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{patientId}, #{patientName}, #{patientPhone}, #{doctorId}, #{doctorName}, #{scheduleId}, #{appointmentDate}, #{appointmentTime}, #{sequenceNumber}, #{status}, #{isOffline}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE clinic_appointment SET status = 'completed', called = 0, called_time = NULL, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinic_appointment WHERE status = #{status}

SELECT
FROM clinic_appointment WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY appointment_date ASC, appointment_time ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT
FROM clinic_appointment WHERE status = 'confirmed' AND appointment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY appointment_date ASC, appointment_time ASC, sequence_number ASC

SELECT
FROM clinic_appointment WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND appointment_date = #{appointmentDate} AND called = 1 AND status = 'confirmed' ORDER BY sequence_number ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE clinic_appointment SET status = 'expired', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId} AND status = 'pending'
